hero.role: Full Stack Developer + AI | Database Engineer
hero.lead: I design and build scalable, robust web applications and services, with a focus on software quality, business needs, and user experience.

about.title: About
about.summaryP1: Software engineer with over 15 years of experience developing enterprise applications and backend services, primarily using Microsoft technologies. Specialized in .NET, SQL Server, REST APIs, and SOAP Web Services, with a strong track record in large-scale projects across industries such as energy, insurance, contact center services, and government.
about.summaryP2: I enjoy working close to the business and focusing on the user: transforming requirements into incremental deliverables, improving performance, and applying development best practices.

anses.body: Development of web applications for appointment management, medical evaluations, case tracking, and integrations with external government services.

trueNorth.body:
Development of REST APIs for financial validation of U.S. citizens.
Maintenance of web applications and services in Azure.

globant.body:
Development of REST APIs for the YPF mobile application.
Maintenance of website and microservices for insurance quoting for AON.
Maintenance of applications for contact center management for the TeleTech client.

teletech.body:
Development of applications for contact center management.
Maintenance of modules for audio and video recording and integration with PBXs.

web.title: Web development
web.body: Full web applications: module design, APIs, UI, and deployment. Experience with technologies such as .NET, ASP.NET MVC, Web API, SQL Server, React, JavaScript, among others.

services.title: Web services
services.body: Development of REST/SOAP API services for the backend of mobile applications and websites.

data.title: Data & performance
data.body: SQL database modeling, query optimization, and performance improvements.

projects.subtitle: Some projects do not have a demo or public repository due to confidentiality.
